steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank introduces a sentence that gives the DC-10's specific lift-to-drag ratio. The previous sentence already stated that the DC-10 ‘is far more aerodynamic.’ The new sentence provides a concrete data point that illustrates that claim — it does not contradict it or wrap up the passage.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Specifically,": Signals that what follows is a concrete detail supporting the prior claim. The lift-to-drag ratio is exactly that. ✓
  • "In conclusion,": Signals a closing summary or final point. A single data point in the middle of a passage is not a conclusion. ✗
  • "However,": Signals contrast or contradiction. The DC-10's ratio confirms, not contradicts, that it is more aerodynamic. ✗
  • "Nevertheless,": Also signals contrast despite a concession. There is no concession here to overcome. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
